title: Portfolio Website
description: A responsive portfolio built with React, Vite, Framer Motion, reusable components, route-based pages, and downloadable resume support.
impact: Designed to present skills, experience, projects, resume, and contact details in one recruiter-friendly website.

title: Business WordPress Website
description: A client-focused WordPress website setup with responsive pages, content sections, theme customization, and practical performance improvements.
impact: Helped create a cleaner business presence with easier content management and mobile-friendly layouts.

title: Custom WordPress Plugin Work
description: Plugin-level WordPress development for custom behavior, admin-side updates, form handling, and PHP-based feature changes.
impact: Extended WordPress functionality while keeping site workflows manageable for non-technical users.

title: Responsive Landing Page Build
description: A conversion-focused responsive page structure with reusable sections, clean spacing, mobile-first styling, and fast-loading assets.
impact: Built for clear scanning, polished presentation, and consistent behavior across desktop and mobile screens.

title: API Integration Workflow
description: Frontend and PHP integration work for forms, third-party service requests, dynamic data, and cleaner success/error states.
impact: Improved how website data moves between user-facing forms, backend logic, and external services.

title: Admin Content Dashboard
description: A dashboard-style interface concept for managing records, viewing structured content, and keeping common actions easy to access.
impact: Focused on organized UI, readable states, and maintainable component structure for repeated admin workflows.
